route.name: Pacific Coast Highway: Half Moon Bay to Santa Cruz

sources.title: Adventure Cycling - Pacific Coast Route
sources.notes: Public route-network page for the Pacific Coast corridor, including the San Francisco-to-Santa Barbara section. This shorter local GPX is a sliced planning variant, not the Adventure Cycling downloadable route data.

sources.title: Local PCH BRouter GPX
sources.notes: Generated by slicing the local SF-to-Santa-Cruz PCH GPX from the Half Moon Bay anchor.

route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from routes/pacific-coast-highway-half-moon-bay-to-santa-cruz.gpx. Local GPX generated from BRouter coastal/PCH concept cache; Plan Ready geometry, not official turn-by-turn navigation.
route.description: Shorter PCH coastal route concept from Half Moon Bay/Pescadero to Santa Cruz using the downstream portion of the local SF-to-Santa-Cruz GPX.
route.surfaceMix: Mostly paved coastal routing with possible gravel connectors; road stress matters more than technical trail difficulty.
route.bestSeason: Broad-season coastal route outside storms; summer fog/wind and traffic are key gates.

resources.water: Coastal services exist but exact hours/water points need verification.
resources.food: SF, Pacifica, Half Moon Bay, Pescadero, Davenport, Santa Cruz services; hours unresolved.
resources.camping: Half Moon Bay, Butano/Pescadero, New Brighton/Seacliff/Santa Cruz-area camp or lodging sequence
resources.toiletsShowers: Confirm by campground/service source before riding.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest bike shops before gate confirmation.
resources.longestGap: Measure from resolved geometry before gate confirmation.
